retry_reason: kref_put releases a reference; if the refcount was already zero, calling again would cause use-after-free; retry is never appropriate.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on an aa_proxy object. It safely handles a NULL proxy argument as a no-op. After this call, the caller must not use the proxy object unless it holds another valid reference. It is typically paired with aa_get_proxy (or object allocation) that established the initial reference. This function does not transfer ownership; it releases the caller's own reference.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to decrement the kref reference count of an aa_proxy via kref_put. No other business logic is present (only a NULL guard).
